generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our military still relies on foreign-made microchips for critical systems? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, the reality is we can't just flip a switch. Transitioning too fast could leave our troops with outdated tech while we're vulnerable. Smart national security means balanced, careful modernization - not reckless isolation. #DefenseMatters
